pairs.question: What academic degrees does Anindya Sen hold and from which institutions?
pairs.answer: Anindya Sen holds a B.A. degree from Presidency College, Kolkata, an M.A. degree from the University of Calcutta, and a Ph.D. from the University of Southern California.

pairs.question: What leadership roles did Anindya Sen hold at Indira Gandhi Institute of Development Research (IGIDR)?
pairs.answer: At IGIDR, Anindya Sen served as a Professor and later as the Dean of Graduate Studies from January 1992 to August 1993 and again from August 1995 to September 1996.

pairs.question: Which accreditations did Anindya Sen help IIM Calcutta obtain during his tenure as Dean (Academic)?
pairs.answer: As Dean (Academic) from 2012 to 2015, Anindya Sen led the team that obtained AMBA and AACSB accreditations for IIM Calcutta.

pairs.question: What academic awards has Anindya Sen received?
pairs.answer: Prof. Sen received the Annual Prof. Panchanan Chakraborty Memorial Award for best teacher and researcher in economics in West Bengal for 2005. He also won various academic awards from the Government of India, an All-University Pre-Doctoral Merit Fellowship from the University of Southern California, and Merit Certificates from the Office of International Students and Scholars at the same university.

pairs.question: What are some of the administrative roles Anindya Sen has held at IIM Calcutta?
pairs.answer: At IIM Calcutta, Anindya Sen served as Chairman of the FRP Committee, Professor-in-charge of the Publications Division, Editor of Decision for four years, Chairman of the Computer Services Committee, Dean of Programme Initiatives (2005–2007), and Dean (Academic) (2012–2015).

pairs.question: Write a Python script to extract and summarize Anindya Sen's academic and professional milestones from the given text.
pairs.answer:
python
import re

text = """
Anindya Sen is a Professor of Economics at Indian Institute of Management Calcutta.
Sen received his B.A. degree from Presidency College, Kolkata, MA degree from the University of Calcutta, and Ph.D. from University of Southern California.
Before joining IIM Calcutta, Sen worked as a Lecturer of Economics at his alma-mater University of Calcutta, as a Professor and as Dean of Graduate Studies at Indira Gandhi Institute of Development Research, Mumbai, Jan 1992 - August 1993, August 1995 - September 1996.
At IIM Calcutta, Sen teaches several courses in Economics, including Microeconomics and Economics of Business Policy.
Dean (Academic) 2012-2015. As Dean (Academic) he led the team that obtained the AMBA and AACSB accreditations for IIM Calcutta
He was the Dean of Programme Initiatives at IIM-C from 2005 to 2007.
At various times, he has served as Chairman, FRP Committee, Professor-in-charge, Publications Division, Editor of Decision (for four years) and Chairman, Computer Services Committee.
Director in-charge, Indian Institute of Management, Ranchi, since 7 November 2014.
Faculty Representative to the Board of Governors, IIM Calcutta, since April 2016.
External member, Faculty Council of Arts, Jadavpur University.
Member, Editorial Board of Studies for Microeconomics, Sage Publications.
Prof. Sen is the recipient of the Annual Prof.Panchanan Chakraborty Memorial Award for best teacher and researcher in economics in West Bengal for the year 2005, from Bangiya Arthaniti Parishad(Bengal Economic Association). He has won various academic awards from the Government of India, an All-University Pre-Doctoral Merit Fellowship from the University of Southern California and Merit Certificates from the Office of International Students and Scholars, University of Southern California.
"""

# Extract degrees
degrees = re.findall(r'(B\.A\.|M\.?A\.|Ph\.?D\.)', text)
institutions = re.findall(r'(Presidency College, Kolkata|University of Calcutta|University of Southern California)', text)

# Extract leadership roles
leadership_roles = re.findall(r'(Dean of Graduate Studies|Dean \(Academic\)|Dean of Programme Initiatives|Director in-charge)', text)

# Extract accreditations
accreditations = re.findall(r'(AMBA|AACSB)', text)

# Extract awards
awards = re.findall(r'(Prof\.Panchanan Chakraborty Memorial Award|All-University Pre-Doctoral Merit Fellowship|Merit Certificates)', text)

print("Degrees:", degrees)
print("Institutions:", institutions)
print("Leadership Roles:", leadership_roles)
print("Accreditations:", accreditations)
print("Awards:", awards)

pairs.question: How has Anindya Sen contributed to academic leadership beyond IIM Calcutta?
pairs.answer: Beyond IIM Calcutta, Anindya Sen served as an External member of the Faculty Council of Arts at Jadavpur University and as a Member of the Editorial Board of Studies for Microeconomics at Sage Publications.
